messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

message.content: This section can answer questions regarding which slot machine games are listed under the "娱乐场" (Casino) category. It specifically identifies the entities "Cash TornadoT Slots" and "Jackpot MasterTM Slots". The content does not contain dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
